fields.helpText: This field represents Form 3 (Evaluation/Admission), Form 4 (Visit), Form 5 (Discharge), and Form 6 (Corrections) records generated for electronic transmission to Austin via MailMan.  Form 7 (Medical  Foster Home (MFH) home specific) records are also included if the site is a sanctioned MFH site.  Field allows for 200 character fixed length record of free text.  Field updated by package only, no user input.
